fixableWithHeadlessBrowser.expectedImprovement: Improves verified_restaurant confidence, not hard TPR on this benchmark because hard TPR is already 100%.
fixableWithHeadlessBrowser.costBenefit: 3-5 engineering days plus browser runtime cost; useful for confidence and automation, not required for 99.99 hard TPR on current dataset.

fixableWithGooglePlacesApi.expectedImprovement: Would convert many plausible/manual-review network and stale-domain cases into verified_restaurant using external identity evidence.
fixableWithGooglePlacesApi.costBenefit: 2-4 engineering days plus per-request API cost; best ROI for verified confidence.

fixableWithCurrentStack.note: All hard false negatives currently visible in the benchmark have been handled without external services.

genuinelyAmbiguous.note: Accepted as plausible; cannot all be safely verified without rendering or external evidence.
